name: property managers handling 10-20 maintenance requests/week tool
description: For property managers processing 10-20 maintenance requests/week, delayed updates cause tenant dissatisfaction. We provide weekly status updates instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or emails.
problem_solved: Lack of timely updates on maintenance requests leads to tenant dissatisfaction.
